items.q: Which tv show features the character Light Yagami?
items.explanation: Light Yagami is associated with Death Note.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Newsroom?
items.explanation: Will McAvoy is one of the defining characters in The Newsroom.

items.q: The character Valery Legasov appears in Chernobyl.
items.explanation: Valery Legasov is a key character in Chernobyl.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Lester Nygaard.
items.explanation: Lester Nygaard is strongly linked to Fargo.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character June Osborne.
items.explanation: June Osborne is strongly linked to The Handmaids Tale.

items.q: The character Sookie Stackhouse appears in Fargo.
items.explanation: Sookie Stackhouse appears in True Blood, not Fargo.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Squid Game?
items.explanation: Seong Gi-hun is one of the defining characters in Squid Game.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Nate Fisher.
items.explanation: Nate Fisher is strongly linked to Six Feet Under.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Rome?
items.explanation: Lucius Vorenus is one of the defining characters in Rome.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Kevin Garvey.
items.explanation: Kevin Garvey is strongly linked to The Leftovers.
